zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Chesham於1394年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾沙安 博瓦時，她的父親John Chesham42歲，母親Alice Bruce24歲。她於1410年與Thomas Cheyney在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾沙安結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1427年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾霍利其享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Chesham于1394年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾沙安 博瓦时，她的父亲John Chesham42岁，母亲Alice Bruce24岁。她于1410年与Thomas Cheyney在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾沙安结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1427年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾霍利其享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chesham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Chesham (Bucks), recorded as Cestreham in Domesday Book , or from Chestham Park in Henfield (Sussex), recorded as Chesham in 1657.

variants.name: Domesday Book
meanings: English: locative name from either of two places in Lancs, namely Bispham near Blackpool ( Bischopham, 1086 in Domesday Book ) or Bispham in Croston.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Chesham was born in 1394, in Chesham Bois, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, John Chesham, was 42 and her mother, Alice Bruce, was 24. She married Thomas Cheyney in 1410, in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1427, in Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor Chesham est née en 1394, à Chesham Bois, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Chesham, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice Bruce, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Cheyney en 1410, à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1427, à Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor Chesham 1394 in Chesham Bois, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Chesham 42 und ihre Mutter Alice Bruce 24. Sie hat 1410 in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Cheyney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1427 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Chesham è nata il nel 1394 nel Chesham Bois, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, John Chesham, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Alice Bruce, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Cheyney nel 1410, nel Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1427, nel Hawridge, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Cheshamが1394年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャム ボイスで生まれた時，父John Cheshamは42歳，母Alice Bruceは24歳であった。1410年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムでThomas Cheyneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1427年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハウリッジで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Chesham(이)가 1394년 영국 벅잉함실르 체샤 보이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Chesham(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Bruce(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 Thomas Cheyney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 호리지에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Chesham родилась в 1394 г. в местности чешам боис, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Chesham было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Bruce, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Cheyney в 1410 г. в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1427 г. в местности харидж, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.
